headline: The 7 biggest storylines from Summer Game Fest 2026
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 concluded with surprising activity. The event showcased major announcements despite industry challenges. Keynotes focused on strength, largely omitting hardware details.

headline: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
summary: Persona 6 was officially confirmed with a brief teaser. Japanese RPG fans enjoyed big announcements at Summer Game Fest. The Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy conclusion was also revealed.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
summary: Microsoft unveiled a special Xbox Series X for its 25th anniversary. The console and controller feature a translucent green design. It pays homage to the original Xbox console's aesthetic.

headline: Minecraft Dungeons 2 gets a September release date
summary: Minecraft Dungeons 2 is set to release on September 29th. This sequel to the dungeon crawler spinoff was first teased in March. Players will return to the world of Minecraft Dungeons.

headline: Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution Are 'Not Timed Exclusives', Xbox Says — So They'll Never Launch on PlayStation
summary: Xbox confirmed Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are full exclusives. These titles will not be released on PlayStation platforms. The announcement clarifies previous speculation about timed exclusivity.

headline: State of Decay 3 Confirmed for PS5 as Undead Labs Stops Short of Delivering Release Date
summary: State of Decay 3 is confirmed for both PS5 and Xbox Series X|S. The release date is set for sometime in 2027. Undead Labs revealed platform details without a specific launch date.

headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's Gritty Extraction Mode, DMZ, Gets First Gameplay
summary: First gameplay footage for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's DMZ mode was revealed. DMZ is described as a gritty extraction mode. Fans got an extensive look at the new gameplay.

headline: Clockwork Revolution Confirmed as Xbox Console Exclusive With 2027 Launch
summary: Clockwork Revolution is confirmed as an Xbox console exclusive. The game is slated for a 2027 launch. It re-emerged at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026.

headline: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'
summary: Lammy publicly disagreed with JD Vance's comments on Henry Nowak's death. Vance linked Nowak's death to "mass invasion of migrants". Lammy asserted the death has "nothing to do with mass migration".

headline: Christian Eriksen conscious after collapsing in Denmark game
summary: Christian Eriksen collapsed during a Denmark-Ukraine friendly. The Danish Football Association confirmed he is now conscious. His condition is stable after the on-field incident.

headline: Zelensky in Downing Street for Ukraine war talks with European leaders
summary: President Zelensky met European allies in Downing Street. Talks focused on the ongoing war in Ukraine. US President Trump's focus shifted to conflict with Iran.

headline: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S introduced a new traineeship program for 1,000 young individuals. The initiative aims to address youth unemployment and lack of training. It tackles the challenge of young people not in education, employment, or training.
